claims.name: E_plus_estimator_exact
claims.detail: (random sphere set E_+ = 2N^2 - N exactly for N=16,32,64: the additive-energy estimator is exact, no binning artefact -- the code-audit gate for every E_+ value below)

claims.name: scale_stability_proxy
